meanings.usage: 指有价值的物品或财富，常与lost、buried连用
指用来揭示或探测某物的机器或装置
表示用仪器或感官发现或查明某事物
指将东西藏在地下或其他物体下面
指为了寻找某人或某物而组织起来的一群人
指仔细查看或调查某事物
指地球表面的泥土或表层土
指进入某地方的开口或通道
指非常彻底地、完全地做某事
指用于存放衣物或物品的大型箱子
指对某事有把握、相信会成功
指使某物显露出来或让人知道

phrases.usage: 表示梦想、希望等成为现实

examples.en: Dreams of finding lost treasure almost came true recently.
examples.zh: 最近找到丢失宝藏的梦想几乎变成了现实。

phrases.usage: 表示尽管、虽然，后接名词或动名词

examples.en: In spite of this, many people are confident that 'The Revealer' may reveal something of value.
examples.zh: 尽管如此，许多人仍然相信'探测仪'可能会发现有价值的东西。

examples.en: Very excited, the party dug a hole two feet deep.
examples.zh: 非常兴奋的搜寻队挖了一个两英尺深的洞。

phrases.usage: 表示确信、相信某事会发生

examples.en: Many people are confident that 'The Revealer' may reveal something of value.
examples.zh: 许多人相信'探测仪'可能会发现有价值的东西。

phrases.usage: 表示被用来做某事，被用于

examples.en: The machine was used to detect gold which has been buried in the ground.
examples.zh: 这台机器被用来探测埋在地下黄金。

examples.en: The party then searched the whole cave thoroughly but did not find anything.
examples.zh: 搜寻队随后彻底搜索了整个洞穴，但没有发现任何东西。

examples.en: They finally found a small gold coin which was almost worthless.
examples.zh: 他们最终发现了一枚几乎毫无价值的小金币。

examples.en: A search party went into the cave hoping to find buried treasure.
examples.zh: 一支搜寻队进入洞穴，希望能找到埋藏的宝藏。

examples.en: The machine was used in a cave near the seashore.
examples.zh: 这台机器被用于海边附近的一个洞穴。

examples.en: They dug a hole two feet deep.
examples.zh: 他们挖了一个两英尺深的洞。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 过去进行时表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在进行的动作，常与when、while等连用

examples.en: The leader was examining the soil near the entrance to the cave when the machine showed that there was gold.
examples.zh: 队长正在检查洞口附近的土壤时，机器显示地下有黄金。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 过去完成时表示在过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作中较早发生的动作，或某事在过去的某个时间点之前已经完成

examples.en: The pirates would often bury gold in the cave and then fail to collect it.
examples.zh: 海盗们经常把金子埋在洞穴里，然后却忘记取走。

grammar.title: 被动语态 (Passive Voice)
grammar.definition: 被动语态表示主语是动作的承受者
grammar.structure: 主语 + be动词 + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 当强调动作的承受者或不知道动作的执行者时使用

examples.en: A new machine called 'The Revealer' has been invented.
examples.zh: 一种名为'探测仪'的新机器被发明了。

examples.en: The machine was used in a cave near the seashore.
examples.zh: 这台机器被用于海边附近的一个洞穴。

sentencePatterns.pattern: S + has/have been + 过去分词

original.en: A new machine called 'The Revealer' has been invented.
original.zh: 一种名为'探测仪'的新机器被发明了。

imitations.en: A new museum has been built in our city.
imitations.zh: 一座新博物馆在我们的城市建成了。

imitations.en: The ancient temple has been discovered by archaeologists.
imitations.zh: 这座古庙被考古学家发现了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: S + was/were + 动词-ing + when + 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: The leader was examining the soil when the machine showed that there was gold.
original.zh: 队长正在检查土壤时，机器显示有金子。

imitations.en: I was reading a book when the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 我正在看书时电话响了。

imitations.en: She was cooking dinner when the lights went out.
imitations.zh: 她正在做晚饭时灯灭了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词过去式 + 数量/尺寸 + deep/wide/tall

original.en: They dug a hole two feet deep.
original.zh: 他们挖了一个两英尺深的洞。

imitations.en: The river is about ten meters deep.
The tower is fifty meters tall.

sentencePatterns.pattern: In spite of + 名词/动名词, S + 动词

original.en: In spite of this, many people are confident that the machine may reveal something of value.
original.zh: 尽管如此，许多人仍然相信这台机器可能会发现有价值的东西。

imitations.en: In spite of the rain, we went out for a walk.
imitations.zh: 尽管下雨，我们还是出去散步了。

imitations.en: In spite of his age, he still works very hard.
imitations.zh: 尽管年纪大了，他仍然工作很努力。
